title: HPLC Pigment Quantification SOP
description: Stepwise protocol for chlorophyll and carotenoid extraction, calibration, and chromatogram review.

title: ANOVA and Mixed Model Reporting Template
description: A structured template for documenting fixed effects, random terms, assumptions, and post hoc comparisons.

title: RCBD Planning Guide for Greenhouse Trials
description: Design notes covering blocking logic, randomization schedules, and tray-position management.

title: Field Tissue Sampling Checklist
description: A transport and labeling checklist for metabolite-sensitive samples collected outside the lab.

title: Sensor Calibration Log Sheet
description: Version-controlled worksheet for temperature, humidity, and substrate moisture sensor verification.

title: New Student Onboarding Packet
description: Initial guidance on safety, expectations, data management, and authorship norms for incoming students.

title: Experiment Metadata Schema
description: Minimum metadata fields for controlled-environment and field experiments, including environmental covariates.

title: Sample Naming and Versioning Guide
description: Recommended file and sample naming conventions for tissue archives, analysis outputs, and manuscript figures.

title: Gas Exchange Measurement Notes
description: Practical notes on acclimation times, leaf selection, and logging conventions for portable photosynthesis systems.

title: Quarterly Data Audit Checklist
description: Internal checklist for confirming file structure, backup status, analysis provenance, and figure traceability.
